# date_samples.txt
# Test fixture for src/date_patterns.py
# Format: TYPE<TAB>TEXT
# TYPE values:
#   DAY      = should resolve to a single YYYY-MM-DD
#   RANGE    = should expand to multiple consecutive days
#   MONTH    = should bucket to YYYY-MM (no specific day)
#   QUARTER  = should bucket to a quarter/season group
#   NONE     = should NOT match any date
#   REVIEW   = ambiguous; flag for manual review

# --- Clean DAY cases ---
DAY	January 20, 1961
DAY	Jan. 20, 1961
DAY	20 January 1961
DAY	20 Jan 61
DAY	1/20/61
DAY	01/20/1961
DAY	1-20-61
DAY	1961-01-20
DAY	March 11, 1961
DAY	April 17, 1961
DAY	October 27, 1962
DAY	November 22, 1963
DAY	22 Nov 63
DAY	11/22/63

# --- RANGE cases ---
RANGE	March 11-13, 1961
RANGE	March 11–13, 1961
RANGE	April 17-19, 1961
RANGE	October 16-28, 1962
RANGE	November 19-22, 1963
RANGE	June 3-4, 1961

# --- MONTH-level cases ---
MONTH	early March 1961
MONTH	late March 1961
MONTH	mid-March 1961
MONTH	in March 1961
MONTH	March of 1961
MONTH	the month of April 1961

# --- QUARTER / season cases ---
QUARTER	spring 1961
QUARTER	summer of 1961
QUARTER	fall 1962
QUARTER	winter 1961-62
QUARTER	Q2 1961
QUARTER	second quarter of 1961
QUARTER	early 1961
QUARTER	late 1963

# --- OCR-corrupted variants ---
DAY	January 20, l961
DAY	January 20, 196l
DAY	January 20, 19G1
DAY	Janaury 20, 1961
DAY	Apri1 17, 1961
DAY	Octcber 27, 1962
RANGE	April 17-19, l961
MONTH	early March l961

# --- Bare month/day with year anchor elsewhere ---
REVIEW	On March 11, the President directed...
REVIEW	By the 17th, the brigade was ashore.

# --- NONE / no-match ---
NONE	Room 1961 of the State Department
NONE	Document number 19610042
NONE	page 1961 of the report
NONE	$1,961.00 was authorized
NONE	The 1960s saw extensive covert action

# --- Ambiguous / REVIEW ---
REVIEW	1/2/61
REVIEW	2/1/61
REVIEW	shortly after the inauguration
REVIEW	in the weeks following the Bay of Pigs
REVIEW	during the Vienna meetings
REVIEW	that autumn
